case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. VS. JANET M. REDMOND et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT REDMOND, JANET M.
